---
name: Test Naming Convention
description: test_<action>_<condition>_<expected>. Three-part names only. G rejects PRs without them.
type: feedback
---

G (2026-04-03): "Three-part test names or I reject the PR."

**How to apply:** `test_<action>_<condition>_<expected>`. Example: `test_validate_missing_doc_id_returns_error`. All three parts required.
